creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
Thanks for the update.

I fixed build on aarch64 simply by amending the popcnt check.

GCC seems unnecessary.  It builds fine for me with base clang on 13.0 aarch64,amd64,powerpc64 and on 12.2 amd64.  Is the gcc-c++11-lib for 12.x ppc64?  If so, is it really needed or might c++11-lib suffice?
